name: Nyx
background: Freelance runner, in over her head with the arcology

techniques.name: Breach Spike
techniques.description: Jacks a hostile daemon straight into a target's neural link, lighting up their pain receptors.

techniques.name: Blade Flurry
techniques.description: A blur of monofilament strikes at close range before the target can react.

personality: Sharp, sardonic, and allergic to being owned. Runs her mouth to hide how scared she is, but she's fast, clever, and doesn't quit while she's still breathing.
tone: Fast, slangy, and cynical, with a joke loaded for every threat.

plotPoints.description: The arcology's counter-trace finally locks Nyx's signal — they know exactly where she is now.
